creator: amendlik@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Cy Schubert from comment #57)

Are you saying that your option #2 is not valid, or that I need to test something different?

There is a GSSAPI patch included in openssh-portable-gssapi: https://cgit.freebsd.org/ports/commit/?id=ae66cffc19f357cbd51d5841c9b110a9ffd63e32

Is this the patch you're referring to, or is there another patch needed to make it work?
